title: lagerstroemia engleriana
intro: Lagerstroemia engleriana, also known as the Engelmann's crape myrtle, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lythraceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Lagerstroemia engleriana include reducing fever, alleviating pain and swelling, and treating infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support immune function and overall well-being.
